title: execution-targets.v1
description: The host/user-specific execution-target & resource registry (ADR-0020). Where each plan stage may run and what external resources it needs. Secrets are NEVER inline (P14) — only references (vexa-secrets:/env:). The committed *.example.json is the template; the gitignored deploy/execution-targets.json is the real one.

name.description: stable id referenced by a plan's `Runs on:` (e.g. bbb, ci, local-mac)

host.description: ssh target / address (non-secret); omit for local/ci

provision.description: how it is created if not standing (e.g. linode-cli via the akamai-staging token)

Resource.description: An external dependency a stage needs (a service, a credential-set, storage, a meeting, a human gate).

secret_ref.description: a REFERENCE to the secret, never the value (P14)

env.description: the env-var names this resource populates

validate.description: the CHEAP PREFLIGHT that proves this resource actually works (reachable · authenticates · funded/in-balance) — run in planning to surface the failure model before execution, not after (Learning #28)
